resources.name: Mumbai Roti Bank
resources.short_description: Free freshly cooked meals served daily to individuals and families in the Mumbai Metropolitan Region. Own kitchen operational since January 2020.

eligibility.special_notes: No documentation required. Walk-in service for anyone in need.

resources.operating_hours: Daily meal service — contact for current timings

contact.address: 1701, One World Centre, Tower 2B, Floor 17, 841, Senapati Bapat Marg, Elphinstone Road, Mumbai 400013

application_process: Walk in during meal service hours
No registration required
resources.capacity_notes: Served 18 million+ meals as of 2024. Subject to daily capacity.

resources.name: Robin Hood Army Mumbai
resources.short_description: Volunteer-run surplus food redistribution from restaurants to families in need across Mumbai. Zero-funds, no monetary donations accepted.

eligibility.special_notes: Volunteer-led distributions. Contact Mumbai chapter to find nearest distribution point.

resources.operating_hours: Weekend distributions primarily — contact for schedule
application_process: Email Mumbai chapter for nearest distribution point
No registration required for receiving food
resources.capacity_notes: 175 million+ meals served globally. Mumbai chapter active.

verification.verification_method: Official website robinhoodarmy.com + published contact details

resources.name: SNEHA Nutrition Program — Dharavi
resources.short_description: SNEHA (Society for Nutrition Education and Health Action) runs community nutrition and food security programs in Dharavi and Sion for women, children and low-income families.

eligibility.special_notes: Programs primarily target women, children and families in urban informal settlements.

contact.address: 310, 3rd Floor, Urban Health Center, 60 Feet Road, Dharavi, Mumbai 400017

application_process: Visit Dharavi center or call helpline
No appointment needed for walk-in inquiries
resources.capacity_notes: 500+ person organization. Community programs subject to availability.

resources.name: BMC Anganwadi Supplementary Nutrition — M-East Ward
resources.short_description: Government-run Anganwadi centers provide supplementary nutrition for children under 6 and pregnant/lactating mothers in Govandi, Mankhurd and Shivaji Nagar under ICDS scheme.

eligibility.special_notes: For children 0-6 years and pregnant/lactating women. Register at nearest Anganwadi center.

contact.address: Contact local Anganwadi center — M-East Ward, Govandi

application_process: Visit nearest Anganwadi center with child's birth certificate
Register with Anganwadi worker
resources.capacity_notes: Government scheme — entitlement-based, not charity. All eligible families can enroll.

verification.verification_method: BMC portal + ICDS scheme public records

resources.name: Shiv Vasi Food Distribution — Kurla
resources.short_description: Community-organized weekly dry ration distribution for low-income families in Kurla West and Chunabhatti. Runs on volunteer and donation basis.

eligibility.special_notes: BPL or AAY ration card required. Priority to households with children.

contact.address: Kurla West — confirm location with ward office
contact.website: Contact BMC ward K-West for referral

application_process: Visit with BPL/AAY ration card on distribution day

verification.verification_method: Community-level program — verify via local K-Ward BMC office

resources.name: BEST Amnesty Scheme Food Relief — Worli
resources.short_description: Emergency food and essentials support for daily-wage workers and informal settlement residents near BDD Chawl and Worli, coordinated through local welfare associations.

eligibility.special_notes: Informal welfare coordination — contact local Worli ward office for current program status.

contact.address: Worli — confirm via G-South Ward office

application_process: Contact G-South Ward office for referral
Walk-in during service hours
resources.capacity_notes: Community-coordinated, irregular schedule. Call BMC 1916 to confirm.

verification.verification_method: BMC ward referral system — verify current status before visiting

resources.name: MSEDCL BPL Electricity Subsidy — Maharashtra
resources.short_description: Maharashtra State Electricity Distribution Company provides subsidized electricity rates and hardship waivers for BPL/AAY card holders. For disconnection issues contact the 24x7 helpline.

eligibility.special_notes: BPL/AAY ration card required for subsidized tariff. Contact MSEDCL for disconnection relief.

contact.address: 4th Floor, Prakashgad, Plot No. G-9, Bandra East, Mumbai 400051

application_process: Call toll-free 1800-233-3435
Visit nearest MSEDCL office with ration card + bill
resources.capacity_notes: Government entitlement scheme. All eligible BPL/AAY households can apply.

resources.name: BEST Undertaking — Electricity Bill Support (South/Central Mumbai)
resources.short_description: BEST Undertaking provides electricity to South and Central Mumbai. BPL households can apply for subsidized tariffs. Amnesty scheme available for overdue bills.

eligibility.special_notes: BEST Amnesty Scheme 2024 available for settlement of overdue bills. Check website for current scheme status.

contact.phone: Customer care — check bestundertaking.com for ward office numbers
contact.address: BEST Bhavan, BEST Marg, Colaba, Mumbai 400001

application_process: Visit nearest BEST ward office with documents
Check website for Amnesty Scheme application
resources.capacity_notes: Government utility — entitlement-based for BPL cardholders.

resources.name: BMC Central Helpline — Civic Emergency Support
resources.short_description: BMC's 24x7 helpline 1916 handles civic emergencies including utility disconnections, flooding, and can route residents to the correct ward office for bill payment assistance.

eligibility.special_notes: Open to all Mumbai residents. Routes callers to correct department.

contact.address: Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation HQ, Mahanagarpalika Marg, Mumbai 400001

application_process: Call 1916
Describe issue — operator routes to correct department
resources.capacity_notes: 24x7 government helpline. Also available via MyBMC chatbot: +918999228999

resources.name: SNEHA Crisis Centre — Emergency Housing Support (Dharavi)
resources.short_description: SNEHA's Crisis Centre in Dharavi provides emergency support for women and families facing housing crises, domestic violence-linked displacement, and acute vulnerability.

eligibility.special_notes: Priority for women and children facing violence or housing displacement. 24x7 crisis helpline.

contact.address: 310, 3rd Floor, Urban Health Center, 60 Feet Road, Dharavi, Mumbai 400017

application_process: Call crisis helpline anytime
Walk-in to Dharavi Crisis Centre
resources.capacity_notes: Crisis service — immediate intake for acute cases.

resources.name: PM Surya Ghar — Free Solar Electricity Scheme
resources.short_description: Central government scheme providing free rooftop solar electricity to low-income households. Up to 300 units free per month for eligible households. Apply via BEST or MSEDCL.

eligibility.special_notes: For own/rented rooftop access. Annual income below Rs 1.5 lakh preferred. Apply via pmsuryaghar.gov.in

contact.address: Apply online — through BEST or MSEDCL portal

application_process: Visit pmsuryaghar.gov.in
Apply online with Aadhaar + electricity bill
DISCOM (BEST/MSEDCL) will process
resources.capacity_notes: Central government scheme — 1 crore households target nationally. Applications open.

verification.verification_method: Official government portal pmsuryaghar.gov.in + BEST website

resources.name: MHADA Tenant Grievance Cell — Mumbai Board
resources.short_description: Maharashtra Housing and Area Development Authority (MHADA) Mumbai Board handles grievances for tenants in MHADA/SRA colonies facing illegal eviction, rent disputes, or redevelopment issues.

eligibility.special_notes: For MHADA/SRA colony residents only. Not for private rental disputes.

contact.address: MHADA Mumbai Board, Griha Nirman Bhavan, Bandra East, Mumbai 400051

application_process: Visit MHADA Mumbai Board office with tenancy documents
Submit written grievance
resources.capacity_notes: Government grievance cell — processes complaints formally.
